description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a predominantly dark, camouflaged finish accented by red and teal highlights. It has a bullpup configuration, with the magazine and action located behind the trigger, resulting in a compact overall length. The rifle is equipped with a detachable box magazine and a prominent optical scope mounted on the top rail for enhanced targeting. The stock is integrated into the body, providing a streamlined and ergonomic grip, while the foregrip and pistol grip are textured for secure handling. The barrel is standard length and extends slightly beyond the handguard, with no visible muzzle device attached. The overall construction suggests a combination of metal and polymer materials, typical for modern urban combat rifles.
description: A compact, camouflaged bullpup rifle with a detachable box magazine, optical scope, and integrated stock, featuring red and teal accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the barrel end, scope alignment, and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length, bullpup configuration, magazine, scope, and ergonomic grips.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock, scope mount, and the compactness of the bullpup design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the magazine, scope, and detailed surface textures.
